allow: Bash(git commit -m 'fix: new packages default to draft \(is_active: false\) *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat: import CSV+JSON con preview, plantillas ricas, referencia de formato, prompt IA mejorado *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: remove level_id from package_versions select — column lives in package_version_levels *)

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const env=fs.readFileSync\('.env','utf8'\); const key=env.match\(/GEMINI_API_KEY=\(.+\)/\)?.[1]?.trim\(\); console.log\('key found:', !!key, key?.slice\(0,8\)+'...'\)")
Bash(git commit -m 'fix\(ia\): lazy-load pdf-parse to prevent Railway startup crash *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(ia\): full context schema + enriched context builder *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(simulacro\): track per-question time + save full answer context *)
